rationale: The proposed homestead exemption increase under Tax Code §11.13(b) bears no relation to Educ. Code §37.105, which governs refusal of entry and ejection from school district property. No overlap in subject matter.
quote: A school administrator, school resource officer, or school district peace officer of a school district may refuse to allow a person to enter on or may eject a person from property under the district's control
_note: No conflict; statutes address unrelated subject matters.
